Index.description: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with 4 years of commercial experience building production web and mobile applications for B2B products. Strong expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architecture.

coverLetter.title: Professional Summary
coverLetter.content: Frontend-focused Full Stack Developer with 4 years of commercial experience building production web and mobile applications for B2B products. Strong expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architecture. Proven track record in developing pixel-perfect user interfaces and delivering scalable solutions. Hands-on experience with React Native and full-stack development using Node.js (Express, NestJS).

items.description: Developed and maintained web and mobile applications for B2B clients using React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Led migration of CRM mobile application to React Native Expo, enabling seamless web deployment. Participated in frontend architecture design for client portal and industrial equipment applications.

Built comprehensive admin panel for content and device management (frontend + backend). Reworked and optimized SVG-based map editor, improving performance and user experience. Designed and implemented technical support module from scratch. Extended analytics and data visualization functionality.

Completed an intensive one-year full-stack web development program. Executed course projects with code reviews in a team environment. Built a solid foundation in React, Node.js, and full-stack development.
